THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORSNIKOFF, NICK SANCHEZ, DOLORES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2130 HARRISON ST, UNIT 4 $850.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $850.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COST PER COST BILL.
